protocol.title: Bosch IVT Protocol. HTTP is local. XMPP is cloud!

easycontrol_serial.title: Bosch EasyControl — POINTT API setup (step 1/3)
easycontrol_serial.description: Enter the serial number of your EasyControl device (e.g. 101714742). You can find it on the device label or in the Bosch EasyControl app.

easycontrol_oauth.title: Bosch EasyControl — Log in with Bosch SingleKey ID (step 2/3)
easycontrol_oauth.description:
1. Open this URL in your browser and log in with your Bosch SingleKey ID:

**[Open Bosch login]({auth_url})**

2. After login, your browser will show an error page (the redirect URL uses a mobile app scheme). **Copy the full URL from your browser's address bar** — it starts with `com.bosch.tt.dashtt.pointt://app/login?code=...`

3. Paste that URL in the field below.

data.redirect_url: Redirect URL (paste from browser address bar)

easycontrol_claim.title: Bosch EasyControl — POINTT API setup (step 3/3)
easycontrol_claim.description: Your device needs to be registered with your Bosch account. Enter the credentials from your device label and the EasyControl app.

reauth_confirm.title: Bosch EasyControl — Re-authentication required
reauth_confirm.description: Your login session for device **{device_id}** has expired. Click Submit to open the Bosch login page and refresh your credentials.

error.invalid_redirect_url: Could not extract the OAuth code. Make sure you paste the full URL from the browser address bar (starting with com.bosch.tt.dashtt.pointt://...).
error.cannot_connect: Token exchange failed. Please try again from step 1.

abort.faulty_credentials: Bad user credentials or wrong IP
abort.oauth_error: OAuth login failed or was cancelled.
abort.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the Bosch POINTT API.

data.optimistic_mode: Use optimistic mode for some functions (currently CT200 Operation mode set).
